global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a clear offer and call to action.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Three phone screens

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating '2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying the main offer.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' is presented in a bold font at the top, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom reads 'Get offer', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a clear, bold font at the bottom, indicating the cost of the offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears in a small font at the top, suggesting user-generated content or reviews.
